notes: Reviewed EN rumor batch R1: first 220 todo records from src/data/rumors.ts in source order.

entries.gt_4fdca973a80913: Before the siren, the ventilation is first to pull in damp and old water.
entries.gt_de21511499dc26: Smell a raw draft from the grille? Do not stand and listen. Go to a hermodoor or past the zone edge.
entries.gt_e0fb66d5930d71: In the chosen zone, the lamps blink off rhythm.
entries.gt_dd021c7f56e4a1: Three blinks in a row means check the map and leave the section before the hermodoor clicks.
entries.gt_04ef7a03d7de3b: During samosbor, a door may knock with a familiar voice.
entries.gt_c1c4eea728fb84: If someone behind the door calls your name during the siren, do not open before the all-clear board.
entries.gt_daae0f0159cf0d: After all-clear, kitchens often are not where people remember them.
entries.gt_6eb50274b74e03: Check the door number first, then look for water: after samosbor, a kitchen can become a wall.
entries.gt_6f1bebf475c3fb: Sometimes samosbor comes without a proper siren. Only the locks click.
entries.gt_d74c45e90cb2c6: If there is no siren, watch the board and the neighbors: a late hermodoor will not save you in the corridor.
entries.gt_216c4e0fc8e6ea: Blue fog is not steam. Do not breathe it, even if it is warm.
entries.gt_f5973435350aed: Wet samosbor travels through the pipes: get off the water, to a dry hermodoor or higher floor.
entries.gt_d1fde394640e72: When it smells of ozone, the eyes arrive before the fog.
entries.gt_138b29e265995e: Cyan film on the lamps is a warning: do not stand under the light, and seal up early.
entries.gt_486b16956d05b3: Meat samosbor starts quiet: the wall warms, then the floor sticks.
entries.gt_fd594b10f3480c: If the room gets too calm, stay in the middle and do not trust a wet seam.
entries.gt_02fbab0def6082: If green light comes through the peephole, do not check the neighbor. Chalk the door number and back off to the hermodoor.
entries.gt_9339f2db8cf449: After Maronary, the right door is where the tag, the map, and someone else's witness all match.
entries.gt_d61dd954f91ccf: Whoever looks through the peephole without a witness later pays a guide for the long way around.
entries.gt_ad97672b676000: The beeping starts in your ears, then in the wall, then in the lift log.
entries.gt_9589dccf944cbd: If it beeps without a siren, pull out the scheme: the short corridor lies first.
entries.gt_81ba8909e02327: Do not go toward the beep without a mark back, water, and a witness at the door.
entries.gt_cc62f2202f72d0: After the green, one door may return with a new number tag and the old scratch.
entries.gt_6ebf25706ca8aa: Whoever followed the beep came back missing half the route and carrying someone else's mark in the pass.
entries.gt_a967ae2163a435: If the door repeats, stay outside, count the sector again, and find a lift detour.
entries.gt_08f9be83e922d1: Green shavings from the threshold are taken with tongs, not fingers: afterward passes argue less.
entries.gt_0c6ff43af8c9f9: Scientists pay for shavings, and the Ministry asks for the door number and a witness.
entries.gt_5ef70f4efb4c45: The cult takes it quietly but does not pay in bread: it asks for a route or someone else's address.
entries.gt_920077f3001820: Do not carry green shavings next to passes: afterward the paper sticks to someone else's surname.
entries.gt_ce44dd50df78e1: If you hide shavings, keep a cache without documents, candles, or rations.
entries.gt_cc2305cd4cf28a: The best cache for shavings is one with only a rusty key nearby and no list of tenants.
entries.gt_e9e22403650cb3: Cultists take green shavings like an address: little bread, many questions.
entries.gt_5b2b186d1bd86f: Whoever sold shavings to a pilgrim checks the cupboard before sleep and counts the seals.
entries.gt_bf49741097afc0: A pilgrim does not look through the peephole: he puts payment on the floor and asks you not to write the surname.
entries.gt_a36b998c4bf3dd: The Ministry buys shavings as evidence and records the seller as an appendix to the door.
entries.gt_754e6f9d458b05: A green incident is better filed through someone else's window: the form will still ask for a second surname.
entries.gt_b971459b3a9a0d: After a departmental purchase, they inspect not the shavings, but who saw where you picked them up.
entries.gt_6c1d9c0bbef7c0: If a green message was forwarded from the common room, turn off the screen first, then count the doors.
entries.gt_bce05f76f60671: Do not read about Maronary from a screen already glowing green: call the section elder and write down the section number.
entries.gt_300756b8e6b56f: The screen explains nothing. It only gathers a queue at the wrong door.
entries.gt_a5a3fc0a3be1dc: The map shows an exit, and the route still leads back to the door with the same scratch.
entries.gt_b977fb61a1d029: If the arrow points back, do not argue aloud: take chalk, mark a cross, and look for the long detour.
entries.gt_e3aa664cadae48: After the green, the short way often ends not in an exit, but in a protocol at the lift commission.
entries.gt_23548b0e57b5f8: NII takes shavings as a sample, the cult as an address, the Ministry as a confession in the protocol.
entries.gt_dfe15e07602508: Whoever you sell the shavings to sets the later price: money, access, silence, or questioning.
entries.gt_1c226ba8abe3c5: The market pays fastest, but asks for no witnesses and not your real pass.
entries.gt_f9f9bff943e079: After the green beep, people wake and first check their own door number.
entries.gt_0bc6838fd84026: If you dreamed the same corridor at night, do not take the shortcut in the morning without water and a scheme.
entries.gt_407f729274634e: Whoever wrote the dream in a notebook got a reason to show Yakov, not the neighbors by the kitchen.
entries.gt_e76df299788340: If the siren breaks into bells, keep a candle, water, and a place by the hermodoor.
entries.gt_aca923d443124e: Istotit holds the room, but the second person at the door is already disputed in the roster.
entries.gt_bbd11c591f17cd: The bell is beautiful only from outside: inside, they count water, air, and who held the handle.
entries.gt_f615b61d6919ec: If the choir behind the wall calls your name, do not answer. Let the elder check the list.
entries.gt_2d47344c83e78f: Gold light on the jamb means not a miracle, but a queue to shelter and a seal on the candle box.
entries.gt_8235b3832e3001: Wait out a wordless choir seated. A choir with a surname already holds someone else's roster.
entries.gt_375d5e2ae12a5e: A golden door may accept the first and leave the second in the waiting log.
entries.gt_2a9323e55412de: After Istotit, sheltered rooms argue not about faith, but about the roster, water, and who closed the leaf.
entries.gt_dcd99b22ffa6ec: Let the second one in, and you pay in water. Refuse, and you pay in rumor by the radiator.
entries.gt_07a00d1c812ea5: Section elders look for the shelter roster: who gets a candle back, who gets thanks, who gets a question after all-clear.
entries.gt_1d31c5afe2d640: After Istotit, the list of surnames is more dangerous than the door itself: it is read by the radiator, not in an office.
entries.gt_e608065ff9fc0c: On the list, what matters is not who survived, but who saw the empty line stay empty.
entries.gt_8ea7080306eb17: They say you let the second one in under the bell. Good. Now the room's water is counted as common.
entries.gt_2fd8ea85d26415: The entered neighbor thanks you quietly: loudly is forbidden, because outside they heard who was let in.
entries.gt_5ee11007878eaa: The yellow hermodoor closed, and the knocking stayed in the roster as an empty line.
entries.gt_ed9fb07732075d: Whoever did not open under Istotit survived, but not for free: the queue remembers the handle sound.
entries.gt_1df4b32315096c: They say the shelter list went upstairs. The house committee wrote down who carried it, who saw, and whom to ask now.
entries.gt_ee8f845f223d13: Whoever handed the roster to the Ministry sold not paper, but a queue of neighbors for questioning.
entries.gt_9bf36a8a3a761e: The section elders read the list and now know who is owed a candle and who owes an explanation.
entries.gt_339fc3ce3c7cc2: When a roster is read by the radiator, gratitude quickly becomes a neighbor court.
entries.gt_8b6b4fb3c94eb3: The fake roster is neat, but the house committee sees it: living surnames do not stand that straight.
entries.gt_2c81ff7c3d30ae: If the list was copied after the choir, the section elder will ask not about the seal, but who held the pen.
entries.gt_883d406aba876a: The roster was bought not for truth. Now the name in it is a debt to someone else's box.
entries.gt_6445abdca8f7ec: Cultists and liquidators pay the same for lists: afterward it is easier to knock on the right doors.
entries.gt_7c00a2a6c54c4c: The shelter list was hidden, and the house committee now counts empty lines instead of people.
entries.gt_a232a86cc8821e: When a roster is hidden, rumor fills in surnames by itself and questions the neighbors aloud.
entries.gt_164640c2930235: Whoever had the roster stolen first accuses not the thief, but those who survived in the list.
entries.gt_590b1f3b51249b: The shelter list was taken from someone else's box. The elder recorded the loss, the witnesses, and the silence after.
entries.gt_d1214dbecbee94: A common church reserve appeared near the golden outline. It is common until the first quiet hand.
entries.gt_422aca614b5c7d: Candles and water are not in the box for beauty: after the choir, people ask for them by name.
entries.gt_8bef414beb3b73: find the common box and decide: share, guard, report, trade, or steal with witnesses present
entries.gt_fb9016bcfeb223: They say you brought water to the candle reserve. The queue argues more quietly now.
entries.gt_03796d5121f5ec: After your water, the golden door had fewer dry lips and more witnesses.
entries.gt_143b4addfc29d2: Something vanished from the common candle reserve while you were there. Small candle, large rumor.
entries.gt_84c388f8baf6b0: Whoever carried water out of the candle box did not drink alone. Now the whole queue thirsts for him.
entries.gt_5b80fde160f1ff: Someone reported the candle reserve to the patrol. Now the box has a protocol and fewer friends.
entries.gt_49bc4b8858423c: Liquidators came to count candles after the denunciation. Tenants say counting water is also a form of theft.
entries.gt_bfdf03f9b8d7ba: The candle reserve door was held while an Assembly scraped outside.
entries.gt_f651ca4673702c: Savva said: whoever guarded the box during the choir has the right to a candle without whispers behind the back.
entries.gt_fd3bc9e183281b: You can get a candle there by more than theft: sealing wax on the seal, a candle-end in hand.
entries.gt_df62364dbc55be: Lida trades wax for accounting. In GIGAHRUSH, even a candle wants a receipt.
entries.gt_2aa406b849eaf3: The section elder has the key to the common box. She opens not the lock, but the queue.
entries.gt_b48c340e926c1b: If a box is called common, it means people took from it with witnesses and returned without pretty words.
entries.gt_1ffec8565cd87b: The section storeroom holds water, bread, and an Istotit candle. Take by list, put back without a list, but in public.
entries.gt_ec9e6468bd6e74: The elder says: the common reserve does not save the kind. It saves those counted in time.
entries.gt_b8ccaa6a4e8f1f: Something vanished from the common box. Not everyone saw it, but everyone standing nearby was written down.
entries.gt_7649d778cafcab: After theft, the house committee does not scold. She asks: who saw, who stayed silent, and who now has a dry bucket.
entries.gt_80810769e2b652: Help was written down too: who brought water, who held the hermodoor, who did not reach into the box after.
entries.gt_3b7432680260d8: If the section elder thanked you in public, that is not kindness. It is temporary access to trust.
entries.gt_f46c6048c24658: At the hermodoor, children go first, buckets second, arguers last.
entries.gt_4168bad26a2717: Whoever makes noise at the hermodoor after all-clear is asked in the morning, neighbor-style, why he interfered with fear.
entries.gt_327b16c512f304: Do not open the white window. There is no yard there.
entries.gt_b881d3c58ce74c: If the map writes area instead of kitchen, do not argue with the map in the light.
entries.gt_54484aa5f91417: The first answer to Veretar is simple: cloth over the frame, sealant in the crack, people away from the window.
entries.gt_d8ef37fd84e558: A white source is not explained at the frame. It is covered while the witness still answers to her name.
entries.gt_d84699698e2e60: If there is sand in your pocket after all-clear, check the rations: white groats are not food.
entries.gt_8e0ce4b0a4e731: White sand is kept in sealant away from passes, or the stamp dries and crumbles.
entries.gt_85c3d1743a6464: Do not put an open sample next to the map: afterward the map turns whiter than the route.
entries.gt_7dd5fc9fb399a4: You can hand sand to NII or the Ministry. You can hide it only from honest people.
entries.gt_4647f47a3d3d76: Veretar photographs whiten without a lamp, so they go in a folder, not a pocket.
entries.gt_001fb93b33ba20: An overexposed frame sometimes shows a numbered room: take it to the archive or burn it before the commission.
entries.gt_b81f71e42d631a: A photo from the white threshold does not lead outside. It leads to questions about who stood at the window.
entries.gt_837a302e0746d4: On an overexposed frame, the extra room always looks shorter than the real way.
entries.gt_642f78763cef0b: A witness was dragged from the white window by the shoulder. Later she cursed in an ordinary voice.
entries.gt_ec08038b900042: At the white window, the person was saved not with words, but by being stopped from looking to the end.
entries.gt_42ada583c981f1: Whoever pulls a person from the frame covers the window with his own body first, then argues.
entries.gt_fb2aa724934d6d: After the rescue, the witness remembers the cloth better than the rescuer's face. That is a good outcome.
entries.gt_15907b05bd6f98: The white crack was smeared with sealant. Test the edge with a knife: dry does not mean closed.
entries.gt_ed7ee06a61b29e: They say someone else's sealant lies under the white window frame. Take the tube only with a glove.
entries.gt_2d5151afffdbed: If the crack was closed after the witness, tenants pay more quietly and look at the floor.
entries.gt_ec21c5f6b39d2c: Sealant does not heal the window. It buys time for people and the long route.
entries.gt_245a1c03569535: Whoever went through the white detour came back faster, but the witness at the window went silent afterward.
entries.gt_926bc2479c7167: The white passage cuts the path, then demands its price: a surname in the log or a person at the frame.
entries.gt_f309fc0e70f877: The short area is not free. It takes the explanation the witness should have given in the morning.
entries.gt_edb5197c509bd5: If you choose the white detour, do not call it a road. A road brings people back with a voice.
entries.gt_47c7a168ff39d9: After the white detour, the map got shorter and the hermodoor queue got longer by one question.
entries.gt_9fbb15214fee2d: A shortcut through the area is counted not in meters, but in who stays silent afterward.
entries.gt_51b93ac46149f1: Liquidators say: if a path saves steps through the white, write down the witness before entering.
entries.gt_8397ef429b0af2: The white window was covered with gray cloth. Do not dry the cloth on the radiator; take it straight to the sanitary bag.
entries.gt_5d3f7f5bc64cb9: Whoever held the curtain speaks shorter afterward: no yard, do not look, call the shift.
entries.gt_4190159bee3759: The curtain does not defeat the area. It gives a second to pull someone away and find sealant.
entries.gt_0bf6c130b8bbfc: Gray cloth after a white window is not patched. It is written off as spent, without argument.
entries.gt_4b62037e50e6cd: Sand was taken from the white sill. Now the pocket is dry, and the rations are kept away from it.
entries.gt_f6d49a359726b9: White sand was brought as evidence, not as a souvenir. That is rare sense after Veretar.
entries.gt_c604464a658c64: Open sand immediately looks for food, a pass, or a photograph. Sealant is cheaper than explanations.
entries.gt_e4fcf33f12fdee: Whoever took sand with a witness will at least be believed that the window was the source.
entries.gt_fb458be5533057: Whoever picked up an overexposed photo later checked the room corner by the nail and socket number.
entries.gt_012784553f1caa: The photo from the white passage was hidden in paper; the archive takes that only in a separate folder.
entries.gt_51f2fbafe30052: An overexposed frame is good for an act, blackmail, or a fire. For a route, it is worse than rumor.
entries.gt_f11bcc3a515464: If a photo shows a room without you, do not prove you were there. Find a witness.
entries.gt_9bcbd04596e80e: An airlock holds fog better than pretty words.
entries.gt_e03d2793b0e0f4: Two doors and a meter of floor between them: close the first, check the second, then breathe.
entries.gt_9043ea4e1a4d38: The seam has started bubbling. So there is more than fog on the other side.
entries.gt_fcebdb1c2246d5: A liquidator crew is looking for sealant: the contour is wet, the leaf must not be opened.
entries.gt_ec3afe9b1f6c52: bring sealant to the bubbling seam, coat the contour, and do not open the hermodoor to a voice
entries.gt_90890c1272ae35: Do not spare the foam. Later there will be no one left to regret it.
entries.gt_d153e512827550: If the foam concrete sets loose, close the passage with a block, not talk.
entries.gt_e5c54bebb4fac8: find the block kit, close the loose opening, or sell the tool to those who will climb in anyway
entries.gt_678da562357b43: The hermodoor was welded temporarily. Here temporarily means until the next commission or death.
entries.gt_1e1f6cdc3bfe16: A temporary seam is checked silently: if someone calls from inside, that is not an inspection point.
entries.gt_0908d0b513cede: inspect the temporary hermodoor, check the gasket, and decide: repair it, steal the rubber, or leave
entries.gt_e19c7f4f07547b: The pipe presses off schedule. You need the manometer before welding, not after the burn.
entries.gt_412fdc43ae1b64: If the needle dances, do not touch the seam: bleed first, burn after.
entries.gt_3cddc05588c8dc: get a manometer, check the contour, and do not touch the pipe without releasing pressure
entries.gt_fbc47b62f3dcb7: Do not put white slime in a bucket. Later you have to burn the bucket with the rag.
entries.gt_e61765d208ddc6: Sanitarians say: do not open white residue, do not sniff it, do not prove courage.
entries.gt_71ea5afe298625: check the seal, do not open the white slime, and leave before the sanitary burn
entries.gt_32191458c4a616: The sanitary burn starts after roll call. Whoever does not answer will not be waited for.
entries.gt_1fe0cbe2e60940: After samosbor, sanitarians count not victories, but what cannot be left in the corridor.
entries.gt_12e3a3605d5605: take a sanitary kit or cleaning kit, clean out the ward, and decide what to enter in the act
entries.gt_368730352e8f0c: Headquarters survive the siren more often than ordinary rooms.
entries.gt_ae6da36e98aa97: Where a faction keeps headquarters, walls are repaired faster and extra things are hidden better.
entries.gt_91858e63a2d95e: Brown slime is taken not for rarity, but for the toxic smell in the report.
entries.gt_54ec0682af2dba: They pay little for a brown sample; the choice is not the price, but whether to clean, burn, or hide the jar.
entries.gt_c05e63f06ec41e: A green OVS sample eats a rag faster than a lab assistant writes a number.
entries.gt_558901fed62fc6: If the jar hisses without fire, move food and cloth away. Later it will not wash out.
entries.gt_0f2c9952ac2c98: A white mutagen sample is handed over in a matte container and with no mirrors near the glass.
entries.gt_4a6413e52c93b3: Whoever stared too long at white residue later argued in the wrong voice and signed the form with someone else's hand.
entries.gt_8afca0d08c864f: Red slime holds a sole like dried resin on a stair.
entries.gt_41e756d73e7bf7: Sticky samples are bought by those who think about traps before doors.
entries.gt_de50eb49014353: Liquidators accept black mass slime only after UV and a recount of the jar.
entries.gt_fdde1a95131733: If the sample is black and warming, do not carry it through the smoking corner: near people, it grows faster.
entries.gt_44e5a46fd69171: A blue sample glows through a sleeve, so it is carried in a black rag and kept away from the panel.
entries.gt_7d56597c25c7df: Scientists pay for a blue jar with an intact seal; an opened one is worth only a burn in the log.
entries.gt_d0f56c012f39fd: The market pays more for transparent slime precisely because it looks almost empty.
entries.gt_4ae5eeaef6071a: Whoever tastes a transparent sample no longer sells goods, but an explanation for why the seal was broken.
entries.gt_11e3d62de6ee96: Someone sold a transparent sample for good money. Now they ask why the empty jar was so heavy.
entries.gt_92ac2b8f04d2e6: If the transparent jar passed through hands, the queue will remember not the price, but the seller's face.
entries.gt_7b7635c0f2a51e: NII accepts transparent slime only sealed. An opened one is counted not as a sample, but a confession.
entries.gt_6925d625c8ac12: The laboratory pays more for an intact transparent seal than for a story about why it was opened.
entries.gt_70fd3b3aca22ab: A transparent sample on the tongue does not make documents lighter.
entries.gt_3a04f2a6d53fd1: Whoever opened a transparent jar surrendered the goods cheaper and the rumor dearer.
entries.gt_3866f7005fcd08: An opened transparent sample can be destroyed. The smell still reaches the log.
entries.gt_dadb2eb8766bd9: If the transparent residue was washed away, someone decided to pay not with money, but explanations.
entries.gt_f775c3e9293283: Gray-burmaline shimmer is recorded not by eyes, but by someone else's hand.
entries.gt_b2243f56ccae94: If the label says look at the floor, do not test courage.
entries.gt_df3804526affdb: A Slimevik does not climb into the throat by itself: give food or a pill, and it will show the sample or lick the stain by your feet.
entries.gt_ba674814481ce3: Do not press close to the transparent sack without a filter. A Slimevik is kind only until a feeler finds skin.
entries.gt_e617ebb7d3c510: NII has a safe Slimevik in the collector: not a guard, but a living pointer to the sample.
entries.gt_e1f61366e44131: The field post asks you not to kill the Slimevik by the feeding tub. Feed, filter, container, and you can leave with marked slime.
entries.gt_6377dbc8dcf3fa: find the feeding tub, approach with food or medicine, do not press close without a filter, and take the marked sample
entries.gt_1709acfb864cd5: If the patient's head looks not quite on the neck, shoot the body from far off and watch the floor after it falls.
entries.gt_c6db171285171e: The head slug likes familiar faces: the body walks like a neighbor, while a wet gray lump hangs above the collar.
entries.gt_20e891e38b8567: keep your distance, do not fight near bodies, and finish the detached slug before it crawls across
entries.gt_38b254c828437c: A slug without a host is not brave, it is in a hurry. The nearest corpse or stunned medic is an empty coat to it.
entries.gt_b6652b6938aa8b: A UV floodlight dries the feelers for a few seconds. That is enough to close the hermodoor or finish the lump on the floor.
entries.gt_8cea3261fa70a6: If the screen writes an order before you ask, it is no longer a terminal.
entries.gt_e1fb032a37345d: Chervie holds to green light: cable heads show where a monitor pretends to help.
entries.gt_3f390551dd3d7e: break the line to the screen, shut down the apparatus, and do not obey the new order from the monitor
entries.gt_239d583c3107d6: Chervie is stronger not from anger, but from the socket. Switch off the source, and the cable becomes meat.
entries.gt_e176ed592d3a15: Take the energy cell after the fight only when the screen is dark, or the trophy files a report on its carrier.
entries.gt_531b715caeb1e1: A boss who suddenly hides canned food and shouts in someone else's words may no longer be the boss.
entries.gt_80adb65b77864a: The flybug loves collars and seals: first it spoils the order, then leads security to the food.
entries.gt_5b5f0507a86b2a: lead out the witness, show signs of infection, and decide: quarantine, shot, denunciation, or flight
entries.gt_d312d13923294e: A flybug carrier must not be treated in the queue: afterward the queue listens to his commands.
entries.gt_6062cbd00de73d: A quarantine card does not kill the parasite, but it leaves proof of why you did not obey the order.
entries.gt_f001f688a81847: In the fog, something sometimes splashes without water. It is not a pipe; it is a pack looking for dry lungs.
entries.gt_f0801db8790fe9: A Fog Shark is clumsy in open air, but in the gray veil it turns faster than thought.
entries.gt_0342b4ca69cade: check the fog with a detector, get to the dry edge, and close doors ahead of the pack
entries.gt_01e63a4800c1ff: Fire takes a shark at once, but its belly is gas. Burn from far off if you do not want to share the blast.
entries.gt_8230bab0c69eb4: Whoever threw flame up close later explained the burn not to the shark, but to his own courage.
entries.gt_8eac1fe7964655: A lift showing a familiar floor in the wrong font is better fed bait than yourself.
entries.gt_dc00d27ef1e809: A pseudolift has a wet threshold and a display arguing with the shaft: inspect twice, then choose the route.
entries.gt_f4b8c01dce7867: inspect the display, throw bait into the vestibule, or step away from the false cabin before the second opening
